model: OpenAI built-in image generation; model identifier not exposed by tool

parameters.identityBoardRelationship: identity-board.png is a deterministic post-generation reference composed from the frozen south, north and neutral source cells after both source sheets already existed. It was not a pre-generation canary, was not used to generate the world sheet, and is not an owner approval record.

negativeConstraints: north must be a complete back view with no visible face
no labels, arrows, borders, UI, watermark or scenery
no cropped subject or cell-edge crossing
no StoneAge source art, character, texture or costume copying

identityBoard.relationship: post-generation archival identity reference mechanically composed from already generated source cells; not a generation input and not owner-approved

worldSheet.identityReferenceRole: post-generation bundle identity reference; not a world generation input

portraitSheet.identityReferenceRole: post-generation bundle identity reference rebuilt from the accepted v4 portrait; portrait generation referenced the accepted world source instead

observedBackgroundFact: The opaque generated sheets contain a spatially varying near-magenta backdrop rather than exact uniform #FF00FF; the builder must measure and archive a border-connected mask instead of claiming exact-key input.
